description:
This quiz tests Bash scripting skills with 16 questions covering variables, loops, conditionals, string manipulation, functions, and syntax gotchas. Difficulty ranges from basic to tricky, with a challenging but informative tone. It's designed for developers and sysadmins looking to sharpen their shell scripting abilities.
Topics: variables, loops, conditionals, string manipulation, functions, syntax gotchas
Audience: developers and sysadmins
